verses.translation: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest

verses.text: وَرَأَيۡتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدۡخُلُونَ فِي دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفۡوَاجٗا
verses.translit: Waraayta alnnasa yadkhuloona fee deeni Allahi afwajan
verses.translation: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes

verses.text: فَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسۡتَغۡفِرۡهُۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابَۢا
verses.translit: Fasabbih bihamdi rabbika waistaghfirhu innahu kana tawwaban
verses.translation: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance
